chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.S-288 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections at flag "A". 2. For hearing of main case. ------ 22.09.2025 M/s. Muhammad Afzal Jagirani and Hyat Muhammad Khan and Mehran Abdullah, Advocates for the Petitioner. Mr. Munwar Ali Abbasi, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh. Mr. Nazeer Hussain, Deputy Prosecutor General, Sindh a/w DSP Shahid Khan, SDPO Mirokhan, Inspector Jan Muhammad Samtio, S.H.O. P.S. Sijawal Junejo. ------ The police officials, present, file their respective statements, taken on record, stating therein that they have neither harassed the petitioner nor intend to do so in future. Learned Assistant Advocate General, Sindh submits that the official respondents are bound to provide protection to every citizen in accordance with law. When confronted, learned counsel for the petitioner being satisfied, seeks disposal of instant petition. Accordingly, instant petition is disposed of with directions to the official respondents to act strictly in accordance with law. Judge Manzoor
